content: The folders will be permanently deleted in 30 days.

comment.text: This text is part of a confirmation message in a dialog box, informing the user that deleted folders will be permanently removed after 30 days. It appears after the user confirms moving items to the trash.

usage.context: <> You are about to move folders ({{ foldersCount }}){" "} to {{ trashSection: t("Common:TrashSection") }}.{" "} {" "} {!isThirdParty ? t("FoldersDeletedAfter") : null}{" "} {t("Common:WantToContinue")} ); } }
